catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Product User Manual for WAVE_GLO_PHY_SPC-FWK_L4_NRT_014_004, detailing the product specification and usage guidelines for near real-time wave data provided by MERCATOR OCEAN INTERNATIONAL as part of the Copernicus Marine Service.

product_line.name: Near Real Time Wave Product Specification Framework Level-4
